title: DoorDash Revenue and Usage Statistics
text: Business of Apps provides comprehensive DoorDash statistics and data points tracking the company's evolution and scale. DoorDash processed 933 million orders in Q1 2026 as sales topped $4 billion, demonstrating robust order volume growth. The company operates as a dominant player in U.S. food delivery with 67% market share, more than double its nearest competitor. DoorDash serves more than 50 million monthly active users across more than 1 million merchant partners in 40+ countries. The platform features extensive selection spanning restaurants, grocery stores, retail, and convenience stores. DashPass and other membership programs have grown to more than 35 million members globally, representing a significant source of recurring revenue and customer stickiness. The company's advertising business has grown rapidly, becoming a significant margin contributor with first-party transaction data enabling sophisticated targeting. DoorDash handles approximately 7 million daily orders, requiring sophisticated logistics optimization powered by AI and machine learning algorithms. The platform continues expanding internationally through acquisitions and organic expansion, with particular focus on European markets following the Deliveroo acquisition.
